title: United Kingdom First Provisional Driving Licence
description: Apply for a first provisional driving licence in Great Britain using the official DVLA online service. This document describes the applicant's identity, identity document, residency history, National Insurance number, and eligibility declarations the service collects. It does not submit the application; the live driver-vehicle-licensing.service.gov.uk source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md). The application fee is intentionally not encoded.

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official GOV.UK 'Apply for your first provisional driving licence' guidance page (online service; paper equivalent form D1). The service confirmation, the £34 online fee (intentionally not encoded as data), the eligibility rules (at least 15 years 9 months old, able to read a number plate from 20 metres, resident in Great Britain for at least 185 days), and identity verification via a UK passport or original documents were confirmed against the source; individual input fields reflect the known DVLA / D1 structure but the screen-by-screen field order and labels have not yet been independently captured. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First and middle names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: hasPreviousName
fields.label: Have you ever been known by another name?
fields.description: If yes, the service collects your previous name.

fields.name: previousName
fields.label: Previous name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when hasPreviousName is true.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD. You must be at least 15 years and 9 months old to apply.
fields.sourceRef: Apply first provisional — Date of birth

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Town and country of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Apply first provisional — Place of birth

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. As recorded for the licence.

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: How will you confirm your identity?
fields.description: uk_passport = confirm identity using a valid UK passport (enter passportNumber); other_documents = send original identity documents (e.g. a non-UK passport, birth/adoption certificate) to DVLA by post when you have no UK passport.
fields.sourceRef: Apply first provisional — Prove your identity

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: UK passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when identityDocumentType is 'uk_passport'.

fields.name: nationalInsuranceNumber
fields.label: National Insurance number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two letters, six digits, and a final letter (A-D), without spaces, e.g. QQ123456C. Provide if you have one.
fields.sourceRef: Apply first provisional — National Insurance number

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Current address — building and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The address your licence should be sent to.

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Current address — second line (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressTown
fields.label: Town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressPostcode
fields.label: Postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A UK postcode in uppercase, e.g. SW1A 1AA.

fields.name: addressHistory3Years
fields.label: Addresses for the last 3 years
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The addresses where you have lived over the past 3 years, including dates. The v0.1 flat model carries this as one text block; richer per-address modelling is deferred to a later spec version.

fields.name: residency185Days
fields.label: I have lived in Great Britain for at least 185 days
fields.description: Confirm you meet the residency eligibility: permission to live in Great Britain for at least 185 days.

fields.name: eyesightDeclaration
fields.label: I can read a number plate from 20 metres and have declared any notifiable medical conditions
fields.description: Confirm you meet the eyesight standard and have told DVLA about any medical condition that affects driving.
fields.sourceRef: Apply first provisional — Eyesight and health
